title: International Flavors (IFF) to Sell Savory Solutions Group
text: International Flavors & Fragrances (IFF) enters into an agreement to sell its underperforming Savory Solutions Group and intends to utilize the proceeds to lower debt levels.

title: IFF will sell Savory Solutions Group to private equity firm PAI Partners for $900 mln
text: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. IFF, -1.41% has announced a deal to sell its Savory Solutions Group to private equity firm PAI Partners for $900 million. The Savory Solutions Group focuses mainly on ingredients for prepared foods and foodservice, including products for butchers, and plant-based solutions for the vegan and vegetarian markets.

title: Bear Of The Day: International Flavor and Fragrances (IFF)
text: Despite a good history of beating the number, estimates for next year are coming down.
